Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Sprint 2 — Triggers (EventBus, webhook, CRON, manual, DLQ)

Architecture event-driven :
- EventBus singleton pub/sub in-memory (découplé du moteur)
- TriggerRegistry route events → workflows (filtres, multi-tenancy)
- Dead Letter Queue pour les events non traités (buffer circulaire)
- Webhook trigger : POST /api/v1/webhooks/:organizationId (Zod)
- Manual trigger : POST /api/v1/workflows/:workflowId/trigger
- CRON trigger via BullMQ repeat jobs (CronTriggerManager)
- publishManualEvent() unifie tous les triggers via EventBus
- TriggerError ajoutée aux erreurs custom
- Wiring startup complet + graceful shutdown ordonné
- Schemas Zod : webhookPayloadSchema, manualTriggerSchema
- stepSchema ouvert aux actions custom (string au lieu d'enum)
- Redis connection factory + getRedisConnectionOptions (BullMQ)
- 35 nouveaux tests (140 total) : EventBus, TriggerRegistry,
  DLQ, webhook route, manual trigger

* chore(infra): speed up Render builds with corepack and filtered installs

Replace npx pnpm (re-downloaded every build) with corepack, which caches
the pnpm binary between deploys. Scope each service's install to only its
own workspace packages via --filter, skipping unrelated dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ui): resolve three visual regressions

Card hover — description text turns blue:
  a:hover (specificity 0,1,1) was beating .ui-card {color} (0,1,0),
  turning text blue in children without an explicit color (MarkdownRenderer
  renders as Mantine Stack, not .ds-prose, so paragraphs had no color of
  their own). Fix: add color: var(--ds-color-text) to .ui-card--interactive:hover
  (specificity 0,2,0) so it wins.

Prose link color mismatch:
  .ds-prose a was using --ds-color-accent-strong (#1d4ed8) while the global
  a rule uses --color-accent (#2563eb). Fix: align Prose links to the same
  token as native links.

Muted primary button gray text:
  No createTheme was passed to MantineProvider, so Mantine resolved its
  own blue palette (base #228be6) rather than the design system blue
  (#2563eb). Fix: wire up createTheme with the Tailwind-aligned blue scale
  and primaryShade: 6 so variant="light" buttons use the correct accent color.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore(submodule): Update mcps/internal to manage-baseline timeout fix (Issue #609)

- Fix: 30s timeout for manage-baseline.test.ts beforeAll hooks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 5: Hybrid runtime -- Celer as a drop-in Uvicorn replacement

Stream A: celer-pyhost crate with persistent CPython runtime, ASGI
dispatcher, and asyncio event loop on background thread. All Python
calls run inside spawn_blocking to avoid blocking the async runtime.

Stream B: Hybrid server with RouteDisposition routing -- native AOT
handlers bypass Python entirely, uncompiled routes forward to the
ASGI app. Added body collection, header extraction, query parsing,
and ASGI-to-hyper response conversion.

Stream C: Thread-safe codegen via TLS globals (GeneralDynamicTLSModel)
on all snprintf/string buffers. Buffer size increased from 256 to 8192
bytes to handle realistic JSON payloads.

Stream D: Parser expansion -- await, f-strings, try/except,
list/dict comprehensions, and keyword arguments now parse into HIR.
Compilability analyzer correctly classifies these as NotCompilable.

Stream E: CLI rewrite of celerate serve with --no-native, --workers,
--max-body-size flags and full hybrid startup sequence.

Benchmarks: 12.5x-35x over CPython, 44-67% of Go on JSON workloads.
176 tests pass across the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(desktop): lazy-import jupyter_client to prevent startup crash

The notebooks router imports kernel_manager.py which imports jupyter_client
at module level. Since PyInstaller excludes Jupyter packages, this crashes
the bundled server on startup. Wrap the import in try/except so the server
starts fine — notebooks gracefully degrade when Jupyter isn't available.

Bumps desktop version to 1.0.2.

**Code Quality:**

Ready for production! 🚀

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: Auto-Tipster Bot with full feature set

Multi-platform tipster tracking engine connecting to Tipsterland (MySQL)
and NotBetting (PostgreSQL/Neon). Extracts premium/professional tipsters
only, follows their pending picks with intelligent filtering, and
simulates bankroll performance.

Core features:
- Direct DB connectors with SSL, premium-only filters, pending picks only
- Weighted tipster scoring (yield/ROI/profit/consistency)
- SHA-256 pick dedup + persistent sent-picks store (survives DB resets)
- 12+ pick filters: odds range, combinada/parlay, live bets, anti-spam,
  date validation, regression, sport profitability, odds bands, confidence
  scoring (A/B/C/D grades), exposure limits, per-tipster daily caps
- Bankroll simulation: flat/percentage/Kelly/adaptive Kelly strategies
  with progressive stake reduction on drawdown
- Stop-loss mechanism with cooldown timer
- Pick images sent to Telegram (Cloudflare/Firebase URLs from source DBs)
- Inline keyboard buttons for intuitive Telegram interaction
- 14 Telegram commands: stats, tipsters, bankroll, risk, config,
  performance, live, history, pause/resume, watchlist, weekly, adjust
- Health monitoring, bankroll snapshots, stale tipster cleanup
- Analytics: CLV tracker, decay scorer, EV calculator, seasonal/time
  analysis, cross-platform odds detection, stake anomaly detection
- FastAPI REST API with 5 endpoints
- Scheduler: picks every 5min, tipsters every 6h, simulation hourly

commit.message:
✨ feat(cogs): add mispriced markets arbitrage detector (#6)

* ✨ feat(cogs): add mispriced markets arbitrage detector

Implement negRisk event scanner that detects market mispricing where outcome YES prices deviate from 1.0. Identifies potential arbitrage opportunities with liquidity filtering.

Features:
- Detects when outcome YES prices sum to <0.95 or >1.05 (10pp threshold)
- Filters by minimum event liquidity ($10K) and per-market liquidity ($5K)
- Ranks by deviation descending, capped at 100 results
- Runs daily at 08:00 UTC
- Thread-based Discord output with rich embeds per outcome

Tests:
- 24 unit tests covering price parsing, deviation calculation, liquidity filters, and ranking
- Validates structural deviation filtering (excludes >10% deviations)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Default changed from 3000 to 4000 to avoid conflicts with Docker Desktop.

with env var overrides (ANTIGRAVITY_BASE_URL, ANTIGRAVITY_REGION).

commit.message:
fix: robust sync with lock + up to 3 retries with delay on SHA mismatch

Concurrent syncToGitHub calls caused race conditions where multiple PUTs
used the same stale SHA. Now: lock prevents concurrent syncs (queues one
retry), _doPut retries up to 3x with 400ms delay on SHA mismatch, and
GET uses cache-busting param to always fetch the freshest SHA.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
